task: Block 3 — True Kanban operational states (7 columns + Completed/Cancelled terminal)
details: DispatchKanban.tsx: 7 active columns Pending → Assigned → En Route → At Pickup → Loaded → At Delivery → Delivered.
Completed + Cancelled terminal columns (Cancelled collapsed by default).
Cards show load#, lane, driver·unit, FTL/LTL/Reefer + weight + commodity, dwell/free/det on pickup/delivery columns.
On-time/delay chip, breakdown + ETA-held flags; delivered cards show factoring status + net-profit badge via loadProfit.ts.
State mapping from load status + optional geofence state (gap-39). Card click opens LoadDetailDrawer via ?load_id= (Block 12).
